title: symphyotrichum drummondii var. texanum
intro: Symphyotrichum drummondii var. texanum, also known as Drummond's aster or Texas mountain aster, is a perennial wildflower native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Symphyotrichum drummondii var. texanum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, including wounds, eczema, and acne.
